description: Phase 2 = curated key press per candidate (media-sourced housing positions). URLs researched + verified 2026-07-08. Only candidates with a substantive, verifiable first-person housing quote in the press are included. Danielle Carter-Walters was researched and EXCLUDED: insufficient housing press (coverage is immigration/crime; housing appears only as grievance clauses in congressional testimony and as self-published site slogans — no media-sourced housing position). She stays off the matrix until she states one publicly.

rows.title: Matt Brewer, former chair of Chicago Housing Authority, running for Chicago mayor
